creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Tomasz,

unfortunately, there hasn't been any activity on your problem report for
graphics/sane-backends (see [1]) for quite a while. In the meantime, the
port has been updated more than once. What is the state of things here?
Does the problem still exist with an up-to-date ports tree, or should the
PR be closed?

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/169371
